rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §433.001, which governs gubernatorial emergency proclamations. No overlap in subject matter, authority, or operation.
quote: Sec. 433.001. PROCLAMATION OF STATE OF EMERGENCY. On application of the chief executive officer or governing body of a county or municipality during an emergency, the governor may proclaim a state of emergency and designate the area involved.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule concerns emergency proclamations and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
